mapper.select: SELECT * FROM `refund` WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM `refund` WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `refund` (order_id, user_id, order_no, refund_no, refund_amount, type, reason, description, images, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{userId}, #{orderNo}, #{refundNo}, #{refundAmount}, #{type}, #{reason}, #{description}, #{images}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE `refund` SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
